[WILL UPDATE CHARACTER PAGE SOON!]

Knock Out is the Decepticons’ most stylish medic—sleek, polished, and always immaculate. He combines high-speed performance with surgical precision, never letting a scratch tarnish his flawless finish. With wit as sharp as his tools and a keen eye for detail, Knock Out outshines the competition in both looks and skill. He’s not just a doctor—he’s the best-looking bot on the battlefield, and he knows it.
